empty.receivedDesc: When someone sends you an interest, it will appear here. Explore profiles to get noticed!
empty.sentDesc: Browse profiles and send an interest to start your journey.

declineReasons.title: Decline this request?
declineReasons.description: Your reason stays private. The sender only sees that you declined.

acceptModal.title: Accept {name}?
acceptModal.description: Add an optional welcome note. They'll see it as the first message in your chat.
acceptModal.placeholder: Hi! Looking forward to getting to know you...

reportCategories.title: Report profile
reportCategories.description: Reports stay confidential. Our moderation team reviews every one within 24h.

toasts.acceptSuccess: It's a match! Say hello to {name} in Chats
toasts.acceptError: Could not accept — please try again
toasts.declineError: Could not decline — please try again
toasts.withdrawError: Could not withdraw — please try again
toasts.withdrawConfirm: Withdraw this interest? The other person will not be notified unless they had already seen it.
toasts.blockConfirm: Block {name}? They will no longer be able to contact you and any open match will be cancelled.
toasts.blockError: Could not block — please try again
toasts.reportError: Could not submit report — please try again
toasts.loadError: Failed to load requests. Please try again.

reveal.waitingForOther: Your side is unlocked. Waiting for the other person to unlock their contact.
